title: radam #7290
definition:
1) (Niphal) to be asleep, be unconscious, be in heavy sleep, fall
    into heavy sleep, be fast asleep
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) (Niphal) to be asleep, be unconscious, be in heavy sleep, fall
    into heavy sleep, be fast asleep

    NASB:  to be in or fall into heavy sleep
